rest.$description: Default primary background color used in the normal, inactive state of components.

hover.$description: Primary background color shown when a user hovers over an interactive component.

pressed.$description: Primary background color displayed while a component is being actively pressed or clicked.

selected.$description: Primary background color used to indicate a selected or active state.

default.$description: Main foreground color used for text or icons on primary backgrounds.

muted.$description: A lower-emphasis version of the primary foreground color, used for secondary text or less prominent content on primary backgrounds.

rest.$description: Default variant of the primary color used to add visual distinction or hierarchy.

hover.$description: Primary variant color displayed when an interactive element is hovered.

pressed.$description: Primary variant color shown while an element is being actively pressed or clicked.

selected.$description: Primary variant color used to indicate a selected or active state.

default.$description: Main foreground color used for text or icons on primary variant backgrounds.

muted.$description: A lower-emphasis version of the primary variant foreground, used for secondary text or less prominent content on primary variant backgrounds.

selected.$description: Placeholder colour of the primary button background on hover (because there is no HSLA or RGBA support in variables now)

default.$description: Used for foreground elements such as text, icons. A shared fg for base, standard, and elevated surfaces.

rest.$description: Ring colour used for focus state

primary.$description: Color for the buttons and accent elements in the sidebar

primary-foreground.$description: Symbols color on the primary elements

hover.$description: Accent surfaces, hover and other interactions

hover-foreground.$description: Symbols on the accent surfaces in active state
